suites.rationale: PR closeout reports combine local checks, traceability, review state, mergeability, and next-action evidence.
Delivery-truth composition decides whether evidence can support user-facing readiness claims.
Freshness policy blocks stale evidence from satisfying closeout and readiness claims.
Runtime cards project repo, artifact, and blocker state into agent-facing decision evidence.
Local Memory preflight classifies required memory infrastructure health and smoke evidence.
Policy-gate output drives pass, warn, and block decisions for risk-tiered changes.
External-state snapshots separate PR, CI, review, tracker, and merge-readiness truth lanes.
